fullOutput:
<path>/home/user/code/pkgs/id/flake.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: {
2:   description = "id - A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh";
3: 
4:   inputs = {
5:     nixpkgs.url = "github:NixOS/nixpkgs/nixos-unstable";
6:     rust-overlay.url = "github:oxalica/rust-overlay";
7:     flake-utils.url = "github:numtide/flake-utils";
8:   };
9: 
10:   outputs =
11:     {
12:       self,
13:       nixpkgs,
14:       rust-overlay,
15:       flake-utils,
16:     }:
17:     flake-utils.lib.eachDefaultSystem (
18:       system:
19:       let
20:         overlays = [ (import rust-overlay) ];
21:         pkgs = import nixpkgs { inherit system overlays; };
22: 
23:         # Rust toolchain from rust-toolchain.toml
24:         rustToolchain = pkgs.rust-bin.fromRustupToolchainFile ./rust-toolchain.toml;
25: 
26:         # Import shared configuration
27:         nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
28: 
29:         # Inherit from shared config
30:         inherit (nixCommon) buildInputs opensslEnv;
31:         nativeBuildInputs = [ rustToolchain ] ++ nixCommon.nativeBuildInputs;
32: 
33:         # Helper to create a check that runs a just command
34:         mkCheck =
35:           name: justCmd:
36:           pkgs.stdenv.mkDerivation {
37:             name = "id-${name}";
38:             src = ./.;
39:             inherit buildInputs nativeBuildInputs;
40:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
41:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
42:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
43:             PKG_CONFIG_PATH = opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH;
44:             buildPhase = ''
45:               export HOME=$(mktemp -d)
46:               export CARGO_HOME=$HOME/.cargo
47:               just ${justCmd}
48:             '';
49:             installPhase = ''
50:               mkdir -p $out
51:               echo "${name} passed at $(date)" > $out/result.txt
52:             '';
53:           };
54: 
55:         # Helper to create a script that runs in the project directory
56:         mkScript =
57:           name: script:
58:           pkgs.writeShellScriptBin name ''
59:             cd ${self}
60:             export OPENSSL_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR}"
61:             export OPENSSL_LIB_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR}"
62:             export OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR="${opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR}"
63:             export PKG_CONFIG_PATH="${opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH}"
64:             ${script}
65:           '';
66: 
67:         # Helper to create a runnable app
68:         mkApp = drv: {
69:           type = "app";
70:           program = "${drv}/bin/${drv.name}";
71:         };
72: 
73:       in
74:       {
75:         # Development shell: nix develop
76:         devShells.default = pkgs.mkShell {
77:           inherit buildInputs nativeBuildInputs;
78:           inherit (nixCommon) shellHook;
79: 
80:           OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
81:           OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
82:           OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
83:           PKG_CONFIG_PATH = opensslEnv.PKG_CONFIG_PATH;
84:         };
85: 
86:         # =======================================================================
87:         # Formatter: nix fmt
88:         # Runs 'just fix' to format Rust and web code
89:         # =======================================================================
90:         formatter = pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "formatter" ''
91:           exec ${pkgs.just}/bin/just fix
92:         '';
93: 
94:         # =======================================================================
95:         # Checks: nix flake check
96:         # Uses 'ci' command (read-only, no auto-fix modifications)
97:         # =======================================================================
98:         checks = {
99:           # CI-safe checks (read-only): fmt-check lint test test-web-unit test-web-typecheck doc
100:           default = mkCheck "ci" "ci";
101: 
102:           # Individual checks
103:           fmt-check = mkCheck "fmt-check" "fmt-check";
104:           lint = mkCheck "lint" "lint";
105:           test = mkCheck "test" "test";
106:           test-unit = mkCheck "test-unit" "test-unit";
107:           test-int = mkCheck "test-int" "test-int";
108:           test-web = mkCheck "test-web" "test-web";
109:           test-web-unit = mkCheck "test-web-unit" "test-web-unit";
110:           test-web-typecheck = mkCheck "test-web-typecheck" "test-web-typecheck";
111:           doc = mkCheck "doc" "doc";
112:         };
113: 
114:         # =======================================================================
115:         # Packages: nix build
116:         # =======================================================================
117:         packages = {
118:           # Web-enabled package (primary product)
119:           id-web = pkgs.rustPlatform.buildRustPackage {
120:             pname = "id";
121:             version = "0.1.0";
122:             src = ./.;
123: 
124:             cargoLock = {
125:               lockFile = ./Cargo.lock;
126:               outputHashes = {
127:                 "distributed-topic-tracker-0.2.5" = "sha256-9wMDB1PGHuzxWiZeRQpGs1m9mTTcjbB7y3kSJomNjeY=";
128:               };
129:             };
130: 
131:             inherit buildInputs;
132:             nativeBuildInputs = [
133:               pkgs.pkg-config
134:               rustToolchain
135:               pkgs.bun
136:             ];
137: 
138:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
139:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
140:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
141: 
142:             preBuild = ''
143:               # Build web assets with Bun
144:               cd web
145:               bun install --frozen-lockfile
146:               bun run build
147:               cd ..
148:             '';
149: 
150:             doCheck = true;
151: 
152:             meta = with pkgs.lib; {
153:               description = "A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh (with web UI)";
154:               license = with licenses; [
155:                 mit
156:                 asl20
157:               ];
158:             };
159:           };
160: 
161:           # Library-only package (no web UI, no bun required)
162:           id-lib = pkgs.rustPlatform.buildRustPackage {
163:             pname = "id-lib";
164:             version = "0.1.0";
165:             src = ./.;
166: 
167:             cargoLock = {
168:               lockFile = ./Cargo.lock;
169:               outputHashes = {
170:                 "distributed-topic-tracker-0.2.5" = "sha256-9wMDB1PGHuzxWiZeRQpGs1m9mTTcjbB7y3kSJomNjeY=";
171:               };
172:             };
173: 
174:             # Disable default web feature for lib-only build
175:             buildNoDefaultFeatures = true;
176: 
177:             inherit buildInputs;
178:             nativeBuildInputs = [
179:               pkgs.pkg-config
180:               rustToolchain
181:             ];
182: 
183:             OPENSSL_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_DIR;
184:             OPENSSL_LIB_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_LIB_DIR;
185:             OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR = opensslEnv.OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR;
186: 
187:             doCheck = true;
188: 
189:             meta = with pkgs.lib; {
190:               description = "A peer-to-peer file sharing CLI built with Iroh";
191:               license = with licenses; [
192:                 mit
193:                 asl20
194:               ];
195:             };
196:           };
197: 
198:           # Default = web
199:           default = self.packages.${system}.id-web;
200:         };
201: 
202:         # =======================================================================
203:         # Apps: nix run .#<name>
204:         # Mirrors all just commands for Nix-native execution
205:         # =======================================================================
206:         apps = {
207:           # Default: run the web-enabled CLI
208:           default = {
209:             type = "app";
210:             program = "${self.packages.${system}.default}/bin/id";
211:           };
212: 
213:           # Run just with any arguments (fallback for commands not added as apps)
214:           just = mkApp (
215:             pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "just-runner" ''
216:               exec ${pkgs.just}/bin/just "$@"
217:             ''
218:           );
219: 
220:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
221:           # Quality checks
222:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
223: 
224:           check = mkApp (mkScript "check" "just check");
225:           ci = mkApp (mkScript "ci" "just ci");
226:           fix = mkApp (mkScript "fix" "just fix");
227:           fmt = mkApp (mkScript "fmt" "just fmt");
228:           fmt-check = mkApp (mkScript "fmt-check" "just fmt-check");
229:           lint = mkApp (mkScript "lint" "just lint");
230:           lint-fix = mkApp (mkScript "lint-fix" "just lint-fix");
231: 
232:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
233:           # Tests
234:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
235: 
236:           test = mkApp (mkScript "test" "just test");
237:           test-unit = mkApp (mkScript "test-unit" "just test-unit");
238:           test-int = mkApp (mkScript "test-int" "just test-int");
239:           test-one = mkApp (mkScript "test-one" ''just test-one "$@"'');
240:           test-web = mkApp (mkScript "test-web" "just test-web");
241:           test-web-unit = mkApp (mkScript "test-web-unit" "just test-web-unit");
242:           test-web-typecheck = mkApp (mkScript "test-web-typecheck" "just test-web-typecheck");
243:           test-verbose = mkApp (mkScript "test-verbose" "just test-verbose");
244: 
245:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
246:           # Documentation
247:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
248: 
249:           doc = mkApp (mkScript "doc" "just doc");
250:           doc-open = mkApp (mkScript "doc-open" "just doc-open");
251: 
252:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
253:           # Coverage
254:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
255: 
256:           coverage = mkApp (mkScript "coverage" "just coverage");
257:           coverage-open = mkApp (mkScript "coverage-open" "just coverage-open");
258:           coverage-summary = mkApp (mkScript "coverage-summary" "just coverage-summary");
259: 
260:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
261:           # Build commands
262:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
263: 
264:           build = mkApp (mkScript "build" "just build");
265:           build-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib" "just build-lib");
266:           build-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-force" "just build-force");
267:           build-lib-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-force" "just build-lib-force");
268:           build-web-force = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-force" "just build-web-force");
269:           build-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-cargo" "just build-cargo");
270:           build-web-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-cargo" "just build-web-cargo");
271:           build-lib-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-cargo" "just build-lib-cargo");
272:           release = mkApp (mkScript "release" "just release");
273:           release-lib = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib" "just release-lib");
274:           release-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-force" "just release-force");
275:           release-lib-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib-force" "just release-lib-force");
276:           release-web-force = mkApp (mkScript "release-web-force" "just release-web-force");
277:           release-web-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "release-web-cargo" "just release-web-cargo");
278:           release-lib-cargo = mkApp (mkScript "release-lib-cargo" "just release-lib-cargo");
279: 
280:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
281:           # Web assets
282:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
283: 
284:           assets = mkApp (mkScript "assets" "just assets");
285:           web = mkApp (mkScript "web" "just web");
286:           web-assets = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets" "just web-assets");
287:           web-force = mkApp (mkScript "web-force" "just web-force");
288:           web-assets-force = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets-force" "just web-assets-force");
289:           web-dev = mkApp (mkScript "web-dev" "just web-dev");
290:           web-assets-dev = mkApp (mkScript "web-assets-dev" "just web-assets-dev");
291: 
292:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
293:           # Run commands
294:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
295: 
296:           run = mkApp (mkScript "run" ''just run "$@"'');
297:           repl = mkApp (mkScript "repl" "just repl");
298: 
299:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
300:           # Serve commands
301:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
302: 
303:           serve = mkApp (mkScript "serve" ''just serve "$@"'');
304:           serve-web = mkApp (mkScript "serve-web" ''just serve-web "$@"'');
305:           serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "serve-lib" ''just serve-lib "$@"'');
306:           build-serve = mkApp (mkScript "build-serve" ''just build-serve "$@"'');
307:           kill = mkApp (mkScript "kill" "just kill");
308:           sleep = mkApp (mkScript "sleep" ''just sleep "$@"'');
309:           kill-serve = mkApp (mkScript "kill-serve" ''just kill-serve "$@"'');
310: 
311:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
312:           # Combined commands
313:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
314: 
315:           build-check = mkApp (mkScript "build-check" "just build-check");
316:           build-check-serve = mkApp (mkScript "build-check-serve" ''just build-check-serve "$@"'');
317:           build-check-serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-check-serve-lib" "just build-check-serve-lib");
318:           build-serve-lib = mkApp (mkScript "build-serve-lib" "just build-serve-lib");
319: 
320:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
321:           # Watch commands
322:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
323: 
324:           watch = mkApp (mkScript "watch" "just watch");
325:           watch-test = mkApp (mkScript "watch-test" "just watch-test");
326:           watch-lint = mkApp (mkScript "watch-lint" "just watch-lint");
327: 
328:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
329:           # Dependency management
330:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
331: 
332:           outdated = mkApp (mkScript "outdated" "just outdated");
333:           audit = mkApp (mkScript "audit" "just audit");
334:           machete = mkApp (mkScript "machete" "just machete");
335:           update = mkApp (mkScript "update" "just update");
336:           tree = mkApp (mkScript "tree" "just tree");
337: 
338:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
339:           # Utilities
340:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
341: 
342:           clean = mkApp (mkScript "clean" "just clean");
343:           loc = mkApp (mkScript "loc" "just loc");
344: 
345:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
346:           # Legacy aliases (backwards compatibility)
347:           # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
348: 
349:           check-all = mkApp (mkScript "check-all" "just check");
350:           test-lib = mkApp (mkScript "test-lib" "just test-unit");
351:           build-web = mkApp (mkScript "build-web" "just build");
352:           build-web-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-web-release" "just build-web-release");
353:           build-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-release" "just release");
354:           build-lib-release = mkApp (mkScript "build-lib-release" "just release-lib");
355:           web-build = mkApp (mkScript "web-build" "just web");
356:           web-typecheck = mkApp (mkScript "web-typecheck" "just test-web");
357:           watch-build = mkApp (mkScript "watch-build" "just watch");
358:         };
359:       }
360:     );
361: }
